findings.description: FUSE workspace has stale copies of build-scripts/generate-html.js AND build.js. The build.js staleness caused the previous AUDIT-001 run to misidentify items 1-4 as unfixed (they were fixed on GitHub but FUSE hadn't synced). Root cause: build.js publish sync step may not cover build.js itself, or publish hasn't run since those commits.
findings.evidence: generate-html.js: ws=d998df94 vs git=69df24bc. build.js: FUSE missing 5 OWNERSHIP entries present on GitHub main.
findings.suggested_fix: Next Mode 2 run should verify whether build.js publish sync covers build.js and build-scripts/. If not, add them to the sync step.
